description: A delivered task with runtime readiness and LLM start but no terminal outcome or agent message must be diagnosed as a stall.
provenance: Covers the live failure mode where the operator sees no response and needs to know whether delivery, runtime readiness, or loop termination failed.
task: Summarize the current Agency runtime health in one sentence.

messages.author: _operator
messages.content: Summarize the current Agency runtime health in one sentence.
